about.metaDescription: How LA MESA works: sign up free, invitation when an evening matches your profile, payment to confirm.
about.title: How it works
about.introLead: One table. One theme. Selected guests — by invitation.
about.introBody: Sign up free. You get an invitation when an evening matches your profile. Once invited, you confirm your seat by paying for the meal.
about.forWho: For decision-makers, founders, investors, and experts who bring something to that evening’s theme. Tables stay small; we compose them carefully.

steps.1: Sign up free — you join the list.
steps.2: Complete your profile so we can propose a table suited to your experience, industry, and the evening’s theme.
steps.3: You get an invitation when an evening matches your profile.
steps.4: Confirm your seat by paying for the meal within the stated deadline.

about.eligibilityNote: Being on the list doesn’t mean a seat at every dinner.

seats.a: On purpose. A smaller table means everyone actually joins the conversation. We care more about the quality of the exchange than the headcount.

themes.a: Yes. Each evening has its own theme. Invitations come from people on the list — industry, role, experience, interests. The fuller your profile, the more an evening can fit.

payment.q: How do I confirm my seat?
payment.a: Once you get the invitation, you pay for the meal in advance within the stated deadline. If not, the seat is released and offered to someone else.

price.q: How much does it cost — and who pays?
price.a: The meal ticket varies by evening and is stated with the invitation. On average, MXN $1,000–$1,500: usually starter, main, and dessert; drinks are often settled on site. Each guest pays for their seat, except special cases (e.g. a complimentary evening under sponsorship).

absence.q: What if I can’t make it at the last minute?
absence.a: Let us know as soon as you can. Cancel more than 48 hours ahead: refund or credit toward a future evening. Within 48 hours: the payment is kept.

guests.q: Is there sometimes a guest speaker or a sponsor?
guests.a: Sometimes. There may be a guest tied to that evening’s theme, or a sponsorship. It’s stated clearly with the invitation.

contact.metaDescription: Write to us with a question about LA MESA, or to talk about a partnership (host, sponsor, private edition).
contact.title: Questions & partnerships
contact.intro: A question that isn’t in the FAQ, or a partnership idea? Write to us — we read every message.

settings.title: Settings
settings.deleteHint: Deactivates your waitlist profile and deletes your sign-in account. Your participation history is kept for admin purposes. This action cannot be undone.
